howItWorks.title: Collect & Weigh
howItWorks.body: Street collectors bring materials to a verified Micro-Hub. Weight is logged digitally at point of delivery — no paperwork, no disputes.

howItWorks.title: Price Discovery
howItWorks.body: Real-time market rates are fetched live from the Kanairo exchange. No more arbitrary broker pricing — PET, HDPE, E-Waste, all transparent.

howItWorks.title: Instant M-Pesa
howItWorks.body: Payment is triggered automatically upon weight verification. Funds arrive in the collector's M-Pesa wallet in under 30 seconds.

impact.label: Collector earnings increase via fair market rates and zero broker fees
Material traceability from street collector to industrial recycler
M-Pesa settlement from weight verification to wallet receipt
EPR compliance built into every transaction — no extra steps

collector.label: Collector
collector.headline:
Know your worth
before you sell.
collector.body: Access live market rates from any feature phone. No middlemen, no arbitrary prices. Your materials, your price — direct to verified Micro-Hubs.

aggregator.label: Micro-Hub
aggregator.headline:
Be the digital node
for your neighbourhood.
aggregator.body: Aggregate materials from hundreds of collectors. Manage live inventory, post buy offers, and connect directly with industrial recyclers.

recycler.label: Recycler
recycler.headline:
Predictable supply.
Zero supply shocks.
recycler.body: Browse verified inventory across the city. Lock in material contracts before collection day. Full chain-of-custody for EPR compliance.

missionStats.label: Paid out to collectors in beta

team.name: Amara Osei
team.bio: Former waste-sector logistics lead with 8 years scaling circular economy ops across East Africa.

team.name: Kamau Njoroge
team.bio: Ex-Safaricom engineer. Built M-Pesa integrations at scale. Obsessed with last-mile fintech.

team.name: Fatuma Mohamed
team.bio: Connected 200+ recycling facilities to digital marketplaces across the continent.

team.name: Peter Waweru
team.bio: Spent 5 years on the ground in Nairobi's Micro-Hub network before joining Kanairo.

timeline.title: EPR Regulations Published
timeline.body: Kenya's NEMA publishes the Extended Producer Responsibility regulations under the Sustainable Waste Management Act 2022.

timeline.title: Industry Consultation Period
timeline.body: Manufacturers, importers, and recyclers submit compliance roadmaps to NEMA. Documentation requirements clarified.

timeline.title: Compliance Framework Active
timeline.body: EPR obligations take effect. Companies must demonstrate material recovery chains with verified documentation.

timeline.title: First Annual Audit Cycle
timeline.body: NEMA conducts first compliance audits. Non-compliant entities face levies of up to KES 5M per quarter.

features.title: Verified Weight Logs
features.body: Every weighing event at a Micro-Hub creates a timestamped, tamper-evident digital record — admissible as EPR compliance documentation.

features.title: Chain-of-Custody Trail
features.body: From street collector to industrial recycler, every handoff is recorded and attributable to a specific licensed entity.

features.title: Automated EPR Reports
features.body: Generate quarterly EPR compliance reports from your transaction history in one click — no manual data aggregation required.

features.title: Material Traceability at 100%
features.body: Every kilogram of material is traceable back to its source neighbourhood, collector ID, and weighing station.

features.title: Real-Time Compliance Dashboard
features.body: Live view of your recovery volumes against EPR targets, so you always know where you stand before the audit.

features.title: NEMA-Ready Export
features.body: Export compliance packs in the exact format required by Kenya's NEMA portal — no formatting or data cleaning needed.
